title: Freight Logistics Document Automation: Streamline Bills of Lading & Shipping Forms
metaTitle: Freight Logistics Document Automation | Bills of Lading & Forms
metaDescription: Automate freight document processing for bills of lading, customs forms, and shipping docs. Convert PDFs to Excel with 99%+ accuracy.
h1: Freight Logistics Document Automation for Bills of Lading and Shipping Forms

hero.headline: Automate Freight Document Processing in Minutes
hero.subheadline: Convert bills of lading, customs forms, and shipping documents from PDF to structured Excel data with AI-powered field extraction

summary: Freight logistics companies handle hundreds of shipping documents daily, from bills of lading to customs declarations. Manual data entry creates bottlenecks, delays shipments, and introduces costly errors. Our AI-powered document automation converts these PDFs and scanned forms into structured Excel spreadsheets, extracting key fields like container numbers, weights, destinations, and consignee details with 99%+ accuracy on clear documents.
whoItsFor: Freight forwarders processing multiple bills of lading daily
whenThisIsRelevant: Processing bills of lading from multiple carriers and formats
Digitizing customs forms for regulatory compliance tracking
Converting scanned shipping documents into searchable databases
supportedInputs: Digital PDF bills of lading from carriers
Mobile photos of shipping receipts and dock receipts
expectedOutputs: Excel files with container numbers, weights, and destinations in separate columns
CSV exports ready for import into freight management systems
commonChallenges: Manual data entry from bills of lading takes 5-10 minutes per document
Typing errors in container numbers cause tracking failures
Different carrier formats require custom data entry workflows
Scanned customs forms need OCR before manual transcription
howItWorksSteps: Upload your bills of lading, customs forms, or shipping documents as PDFs or images
AI extracts key fields like shipper, consignee, container numbers, weights, and commodity codes
Review and customize field selections for your specific document formats
Download structured Excel files with one row per shipment for easy import
whyPdfExcelAiFits: Handles various carrier formats and layouts without manual template creation
OCR processes scanned dock receipts and handwritten delivery confirmations
Batch processing converts entire folders of shipping documents overnight
Custom field selection adapts to your freight management system requirements
limitations: Handwritten notes on bills of lading may require manual verification
Complex multi-carrier consolidated shipment documents might need review
Document quality affects extraction accuracy for faded or poor scans

faq.question: Can this process bills of lading from different shipping carriers?
faq.answer: Yes, the AI adapts to various carrier formats including Maersk, MSC, and CMA CGM bills of lading without requiring separate templates for each carrier format.

faq.question: How accurate is the extraction for container numbers and tracking codes?
faq.answer: The system achieves 99%+ accuracy on clear, typed documents. Container numbers and BOL numbers are specifically optimized for high accuracy extraction.

faq.question: Can it handle scanned customs forms with stamps and signatures?
faq.answer: Yes, OCR processes scanned customs forms, though heavily stamped areas may need manual review. Clear typed sections extract with high accuracy.

faq.question: Does this integrate with freight management systems like CargoWise?
faq.answer: The tool exports to Excel and CSV formats that can be imported into most freight management systems. Direct API integration is not currently available.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and automatically deleted after processing for security
99%+ accuracy on clear, typed shipping documents
Free tier available to test with your actual documents
Batch processing handles multiple documents simultaneously
exampleUseCases: Convert 50 bills of lading from different carriers into a single Excel tracking sheet
Extract commodity codes and values from customs forms for compliance reporting
Digitize scanned delivery receipts for proof of delivery documentation
Process air waybills and sea waybills into standardized data formats
